scope: AgenC agents/control.ts ↔ codex codex-rs/core/src/agent/control.rs strict parity

requiredBehaviors: SpawnAgentForkMode union mirrors codex enum: full_history | last_n_turns(n: number)
no extra variants beyond codex (new/explicit removed in B.6)
type exported for use by SpawnAgentOptions and forking helpers
SpawnAgentOptions interface mirrors codex struct fields
carries optional roleName, agentName, agentPath, model, reasoningEffort, forkMode, forkParentSpawnCallId
consumed by spawn() and spawnAgentWithMetadata()
LiveAgent interface carries agentId, agentPath, role, depth, nickname, status tracker
exposes upInbox + downInbox mailboxes (AgenC bidirectional adaptation; codex unidirectional)
metadata snapshot captured at spawn time
ListedAgent interface returned by listAgents
fields: agentName, agentStatus, lastTaskMessage
matches codex protocol shape post-toAgentStatusJson encoding
AgentControl class constructor wires session, registry, threadManager
initializes parentTokens map for spawn-time interrupt cascade
exposes registry handle for nickname allocation (Phase H.4)
I-1 depth cap: rejects when childDepth > maxDepth with MaxDepthExceededError
I-32 atomic slot reservation: reserveSpawnSlot before allocating; release on parent-interrupt race
I-37 path collision: explicit agentPath is reserved before nickname allocation and finalize replaces the reservation with live metadata
I-63 cooperative atomicity: post-await tail through finalize is synchronous
AgentLimitReachedError surfaces from registry; emits agent_limit_reached warning
creates upInbox + downInbox mailboxes wired with backpressure warnings
registers parent token for spawn-race detection
rejects unrecognized roleName before live agent metadata is registered

configSnapshot recorded on the live handle

matches codex's spawn_forked_thread guard at control.rs:337/342
rebuilds LiveAgent for root + every open descendant
honors rollout-store-owned spawn-edge snapshot
parent failures short-circuit their subtree (matches codex resume queue semantics)
emits rollout_resume_unavailable when no rollout store mounted
returns resumedCount + rootLive
routes user input to child via downInbox with direction='down'
updates registry.lastTaskMessage via renderInputPreview
rejects sends to closed mailboxes (MailboxClosedError)
I-5: bidirectional routing through child.downInbox
appends a message to child without triggering a new turn (triggerTurn=false)
updates lastTaskMessage with renderInputPreview
routes via downInbox direction='down'
delivers an InterAgentCommunication to a child mailbox with author/recipient/content

matches codex's InterAgentCommunication shape (no metadata field on the wire)
model-facing interaction end event is emitted after delivery attempt with current receiver status
I-5 interrupt cascade: parent interrupt propagates to all live descendants
ABORT signal flips on the parent token; new spawns observe and abort mid-spawn
synthetic interrupt notice written to child's downInbox
matches codex's interrupt_agent semantics on control.rs:680
transitions live agent to terminal status (shutdown/errored/completed) and releases the slot
closes both up + down mailboxes (I-31: agent_exited sentinel emitted from upInbox once)
removes the LiveAgent entry; nickname is intentionally retained per codex semantics
idempotent on already-final agents
closes the spawned agent and ALL live descendants (subtree closure)

subscribeStatus snapshot captured BEFORE close so previous_status is correct
emits collab_close_begin / collab_close_end events
returns AgentStatus for known agentId; not_found for an unrecognized agentId
no idle variant emitted (B.3: idle removed)
delegates to LiveAgent.status.value for live agents
idempotent: re-registering the same threadId is a no-op
registers /root path in registry.byPath
rootThreadId set on AgentControl
returns AgentMetadata snapshot by threadId from registry
undefined for an unrecognized agent
metadata reflects the snapshot taken at spawn time
returns all live descendant thread IDs of a given parent
uses spawn-edge snapshot for tree traversal
includes the parent itself in the returned set

undefined for an unrecognized agent
snapshot is read-only and reflects spawn-time config
accepts canonical agentPath, relative name, agentId, or nickname
returns canonical AgentPath + threadId tuple
throws structured error when reference cannot be resolved
delivers replay of current status to new subscriber (BehaviorSubject semantics)
subsequent transitions delivered in order

consumed by sendInput / appendMessage to update lastTaskMessage

approvedExceptions.reason: Allows TypeScript top-type annotations and Codex not-recognized error assertions; behavior rows remain required.
Allows Codex followup_task identifiers and child continuation-turn assertions; not completion-deferral language.
